channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team. The Hurricanes acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade Friday night.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina gets another big win against No. 5 LSU to continue SEC domination
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina showed once more who’s in charge of the Southeastern Conference. The No. 2 Gamecocks (19-1, 7-0 SEC) got 14 points from Joyce Edwards and used their trademark lockdown defense to end No. 5 LSU’s perfect start to the season with a 66-56 victory on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pirates 'bummed' after young collector, who scored one-of-a-kind Paul Skenes card, declines team's offer
item.description: The collector who landed the rare MLB debut patch card featuring pitching sensation Paul Skenes has declined a trade offer from the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Philadelphia Rocky statue dressed in Redskins gear ahead of NFC title game between Eagles and Commanders
item.description: The famous Rocky statue in downtown Philadelphia was vandalized and dressed in Washington Redskins gear ahead of the NFC championship game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No deal. Young collector who nabbed one-of-a-kind Paul Skenes card turns down Pirates trade offer
item.description: The young collector who scored a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes has turned down a trade offer from the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texans fire offensive coordinator Bobby Slowik and offensive line coach, AP source says
item.description: The Houston Texans fired offensive coordinator Bobby Slowik and offensive line coach Chris Strausser on Friday, a person with knowledge of the dismissals told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the firings have not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patrick Mahomes' grandfather in hospice just days before Chiefs' AFC title game vs. Bills, his mother says
item.description: Patrick Mahomes' mother, Randi Mahomes, announced on Instagram Friday that the quarterback's grandfather is in hospice, amid a turbulent year for the family.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl champion and Nebraska legend Calvin Jones dead at 54
item.description: Super Bowl champion and Nebraska Cornhuskers legend Calvin Jones died on Wednesday at 54 years. Jones was one-half of Nebaska's legendary "we-back" duo.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jaguars hire Bucs OC Liam Coen as head coach after making necessary moves
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen as the eighth head coach in franchise history Friday, capping a covert operation that included owner Shad Khan moving on from general manager Trent Baalke and Coen reversing course with the Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saquon Barkley is running his way into the NFL record book, and possibly his 1st Super Bowl
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley is unsure himself why exactly over the final 30 yards of a 78-yard scoring burst through the playoff snow in a run that whipped Philadelphia Eagles fans out of their frigid state and into a frenzy he cradled the football in his left hand and repeatedly smacked his
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nikola Jokić drains near full-court shot en route to joining elite company with dominant triple-double
item.description: Denver Nuggets star Nikola Jokić joined elite company with a dominant triple-double on Thursday night, all while he drained a near full-court heave.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep Spotlight: Why this small, Antioch private school is hungry for a state title
item.description: Cornerstone Christian has high aspirations. Two brothers star for Homestead's basketball team. Is St. Joseph's-Santa Maria the biggest threat to NorCal's best? De La Salle football star commits to Bill Belichick, North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders have agreed to hire Pete Carroll as their head coach, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The new Champions League format appears to be leveling the playing field. Just ask Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — A bold new vision for the Champions League was launched this season, meaning more games and more money for European soccer's elite, as well as a rebuttal to the threat of a controversial breakaway super league.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani's ex-interpreter impersonated Dodgers star to push through 6-figure wire transfer, audio reveals
item.description: An audio recording showing Ippei Mizuhara, the ex-interpreter of Shohei Ohtani, impersonating the Dodgers' star to push through a wire transfer was disclosed by federal prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia high school basketball player assaults pair of athletes from opposing team, video shows
item.description: Social media video shows a few of the chaotic moments that occurred in the second half of a basketball game between two high school teams in Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olympian Levi Jung-Ruivivar to step back from competition for eating disorder treatment
item.description: Stanford gymnast Levi Jung-Ruivivar, 18, revealed she is taking a break from school and gymnastics to be treated for an eating disorder.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: RSL players Diego Luna and Emeka Eneli shine for US Men's National Team
item.description: After subbing into the match against Venezuela on Saturday night to help the U.S. Men’s National Team secure a 3-1 victory, Real Salt Lake stars Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna earned starts on Wednesday night in a commanding 3-0 victory over Costa Rica.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oakland Roots soccer team eyes short-term home at Coliseum
item.description: (BCN) -- The Oakland Roots professional soccer team wants to continue playing at the Coliseum for the "short-term" following the 2025 season, according to team officials.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: NFL playoffs: Championship weekend on tap as 4 teams vie for a trip to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The road to Super Bowl LIX ends Sunday. It's championship weekend, and by the time it's all over, we'll know which teams will represent the AFC and NFC on Sunday, Feb. 9, in New Orleans to play for the Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: PGA Tour looking to move 2025 Genesis Invitational to Torrey Pines
item.description: The tournament was scheduled to take place from Feb. 13 to 16 at The Riviera Country Club, which is in the Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9

item.title: Rondé Barber helps build Habitat for Humanity home
item.description: ST. PETERSBURGH, Fla. (WFLA) - Community leaders got together Tuesday to build a home for a family in St. Petersburg. This will serve as the first official build day for Habitat for Humanity Tampa Bay Gulfside's fourth annual CEO Build.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here's why a Buffalo Bills fan ran 17 miles to get to the game
item.description: Buffalo Bills fans show their support for the team in all sorts of ways, and for one fan it's by going the distance.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
